title: تنقيط حرف العين
instruction_en: Trace the dotted letter ع (ayn). Single-letter dotted-tracing worksheet: a name line (الاسم) at top, a large reference letter and an example picture, the letter shown with stroke-order arrows, then rows of dotted ع to trace over.

items.activity: traceLetter — reference: large ع (green) and a picture of a bunch of grapes (عنب, grapes); the example word عنب is shown with the ع highlighted
traceLetter — stroke-order model of ع with directional arrows (dotted start point + arrows)
traceLetter — two rows of dotted ع forms to trace over the baseline (top row larger isolated/initial ع, bottom row smaller; right columns add stroke-order arrows)

notes: Single-letter dotted-tracing worksheet for ع (ayn). Folder has m001.jpeg (with green reference letter and orange stroke arrows) and m002.wdp (JPEG-XR, not viewable). No Arabic instruction sentence printed — only the name field (الاسم) heading and the example word عنب (grapes, matching the grapes illustration). Footer credit: learnwithanas.blogspot.com. Tracing rows show the open-headed ع form over a baseline; arrows indicate the head/hook first. Read by sight; clear.
